tasks.title: Подготовка к Gate 2 — Minimal Governance Loop
tasks.detail: Gate 2 требует: minimal_governance_loop_runner.py запускается локально end-to-end, возвращает детерминированный trace. Файл сейчас усечён. Использовать Run script с Path.write_text() для полной реализации minimal loop.
tasks.example_objective:
Run script:
"""
import json
from pathlib import Path

loop_code = '''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json

def run_minimal_loop(input_task):
    trace = {
        "input": input_task,
        "steps": [
            {"role": "analyst", "action": "propose", "result": "proposal_ok"},
            {"role": "auditor", "action": "review", "result": "approved"},
            {"role": "executor", "action": "execute", "result": "executed"},
            {"role": "auditor", "action": "verify", "result": "verified"}
        ],
        "status": "completed",
        "release_pass": False
    }
    return trace

def main():
    task = {"id": "GATE2-TEST", "title": "minimal loop smoke test"}
    result = run_minimal_loop(task)
    print(json.dumps(result, indent=2))
    return 0

if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
'''

p = Path('governance/runtime/minimal_governance_loop_runner.py')
p.write_text(loop_code)
changed_files.append(str(p))
assert len(p.read_bytes()) > 100
import ast; ast.parse(p.read_text())
"""
No issue comments.
tasks.proof_required: governance/runtime/minimal_governance_loop_runner.py > 100 байт, ast.parse OK, содержит run_minimal_loop и def main
